news.title:
Emkay Global's Dec 2025 net sales rose 13.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 87.08 crore, but net profit fell 49.8% to Rs 4.3 crore.
EBITDA decreased 18.8% to Rs 13 crore; EPS dropped to Rs 1.68 from Rs 3.45. Shares closed at Rs 271.15 on Jan 23, 2026.
news.summary:
Emkay Global's Dec 2025 net sales rose 13.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 87.08 crore, but net profit fell 49.8% to Rs 4.3 crore.
EBITDA decreased 18.8% to Rs 13 crore; EPS dropped to Rs 1.68 from Rs 3.45. Shares closed at Rs 271.15 on Jan 23, 2026.
